preset_manifest.scope: research-only public dictionary/Lotus preset evidence probe
preset_manifest.metadata_policy: public preset bytes are versioned and not stored per file; selector and version bytes are charged
preset_manifest.match_rule: selected dictionary record regenerates the exact public byte entry; unmatched bytes are literal records
preset_manifest.promotion_gate: schema-family-public-v0 must shrink at least three unrelated held-out ordinary schema families while shadow/binary controls stay null

summary.conclusion: Frozen schema-native public dictionaries meet the research gate for schema-shaped held-out corpora; this is dictionary-preset evidence, not current .tlmr format support or proof of hash-manifold compression.
